content.cn_text: 你会听到导游在和她的旅行团说话。
content.en_text: You will hear a tour guide talking to her tour group.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有时间阅读问题11-18。
content.en_text: First you will have time to look at questions 11-18.

content.cn_text: [暂停30秒]现在仔细听并回答问题11-18。
content.en_text: [Pause 30 seconds] Now listen carefully and answer questions 11-18.

content.cn_text: 导游:
content.en_text: Tour guide:

content.cn_text: 我们现在站在这栋相当华丽的二十世纪建筑一楼的入口大厅前，这里曾经是格雷夫斯的雷德福勋爵的家，但现在，当然，已经被改成了国家艺术博物馆。
content.en_text: So here we are in front of the entrance hall on the ground floor of this rather splendid twentieth-century building, once the home of Lord Redford of Graves, but which now, of course, has been converted into the National Art Museum.

content.cn_text: 现在，直视入口走廊的尽头，它会变窄;那扇门将带你进入主展览厅。
content.en_text: Now, look straight ahead towards the end of the entrance hallway to where it narrows; that door will take you into the Main Exhibition Hall.

content.cn_text: 或者，如果你在第一个路口右转，你会来到现代艺术区，旁边是现代艺术工作室，在那里你可以看到专业艺术家正在创作他们最新的杰作;迷人的!
content.en_text: Alternatively, if you take the first right, you'll come to the Modern Art section, and next to that is the  Modern Art Studio where you can see professional artists at work on their latest masterpieces; fascinating!

content.cn_text: 另一方面，从入口走廊左转，就会带你到古典艺术区。
content.en_text: Taking a left off the entrance hallway on the other hand, will lead you to the Classical Art section.

content.cn_text: 如果你看一下入口处墙上的地图，你会注意到有两条走廊通向一楼的后面，一条在左边，一条在右边。
content.en_text: If you look at the map on the entrance wall here, you will notice that there are two corridors running towards the back of the ground floor, one on the left and one on the right.

content.cn_text: 它们都通向后面的走廊，那里是另外四个展览室的所在地。
content.en_text: They both lead onto the rear corridor, which is home to a further four exhibition rooms.

content.cn_text: 在最右边，我们有景观部分;在走廊的中心是静物部，在走廊的最左边，有两个房间。
content.en_text: On the far right, we have the Landscape section; in the centre of the corridor is the  Still Life section, and on the far left of the corridor, there are two rooms.

content.cn_text: 当你沿着走廊向他们走去时，你左边的是艺术史室，对面的是数字艺术室。
content.en_text: As you walk down the corridor towards them, the one on your left is the History of Art room and the one opposite is the  Digital Art room.

content.cn_text: 对的;那我们开始吧，好吗?
content.en_text: Right; let's get started then, shall we?

content.cn_text: 旁白:在你听到剩下的讨论之前，你有一些时间看看问题19-20。
content.en_text: Narrator: Before you hear the rest of the discussion, you have some time to look at questions 19-20.

content.cn_text: [暂停30秒]
content.en_text: [Pause 30 seconds]

content.cn_text: 现在听录音，回答问题19-20。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 19-20.

content.cn_text: 我们的第一站是楼下的数字艺术室。
content.en_text: Our first port of call will be the Digital Art room down at the end.

content.cn_text: 这个展览刚开了一个多月，但到目前为止已经证明非常受游客欢迎。
content.en_text: This exhibition has been open little more than a month, but has proved hugely popular with visitors so far.

content.cn_text: 这是一个互动的展览空间，鼓励参观者触摸和感受展品到他们的心的内容;当然，我不需要提醒你，这在博物馆的其他地方是禁止的，使用相机也是禁止的，所以请确保你离开数字艺术室后不要拍照。
content.en_text: It is an interactive exhibition space and visitors are encouraged to touch and feel the exhibits to their heart's content; though, of course, I shouldn't need to remind you that this is forbidden in the rest of the museum, as is the use of cameras, so please ensure that you do not take any pictures once you leave the Digital Art room.

content.cn_text: 旁白:第二部分结束了。
content.en_text: Narrator: That's the end of Section 2.

content.cn_text: 你有半分钟的时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: [暂停30秒]
content.en_text: [Pause 30 seconds]

content.cn_text: 现在转到第三部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to Section 3.

groups.desc:
Questions 11-18
Label the map below with the names of the different areas of the museum.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

items.analysis: 文中明确提到“On the far right, we have the Landscape section;”，说明在最右边的是风景区。因此，题目中第11题的正确答案是“Landscape section”。考生需要注意听力中的方向词汇“far right”，并将其与地图上的位置对应起来。
文中提到“if you take the first right, you'll come to the Modern Art section, and next to that is the Modern Art Studio”，说明走第一个右转会到达现代艺术区，旁边就是现代艺术工作室。因此，地图上第12题的位置应该是“Modern Art Studio”。

在这道题中，定位词是“right”，信号词是“first right”。原文中明确提到“if you take the first right, you'll come to the Modern Art section.（如果你往第一个右转，就会到达现代艺术区）”。因为第13题需要填写的是进入大厅右侧的第一个房间，因此答案是"Modern Art section"。通过抓住方位词“first right”，我们可以准确找到对应的房间位置和名称。
因为听力中明确提到“Taking a left off the entrance hallway”会引导你到古典艺术区（Classical Art section），并且题目地图上的第14题位置在左下角，符合描述，因此正确答案是“Classical Art (section)”。

原文中提到“Now, look straight ahead towards the end of the entrance hallway to where it narrows; that door will take you into the Main Exhibition Hall.”，这句明确说明了15号位置对应的是“Main Exhibition Hall”。通过提到的定位词“straight ahead”和“end of the entrance hallway”，可以准确定位到这个答案。因此，第15题的正确答案是“Main Exhibition Hall”。

items.answer: History of Art / History of room / Art / room
items.analysis: 因为听力原文明确指出在走廊最左侧的房间是“History of Art room”。通过定位词“left”和信号词“far left of the corridor”，可以准确找到答案。学生在听力过程中应特别注意这些关键词和方向描述，以确保答案的准确性。
因为听力原文中明确提到“the one opposite is the Digital Art room”，而该句是对走廊尽头左边和右边房间位置的描述，所以“Digital Art room”是第17题正确答案。题干中的“far left of the corridor”帮助我们定位到这部分内容。
因为原文中明确提到“in the centre of the corridor is the Still Life section”，结合图中的18号位置在走廊中央，显然答案是“Still Life (section)”。定位词“corridor”和“centre”帮助考生快速找到相关信息，而信号词“in the centre of the corridor”引导考生准确定位到答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 19-20
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: The Digital Art exhibition has been open
items.analysis: 原文中提到"This exhibition has been open little more than a month"，意味着展览开放的时间略多于一个月。"little more than a month"可以等同于"just over 30 days"，因为一个月通常有30或31天。因此，选项C "for just over 30 days"最准确地反映了原文的意思。

items.title: Taking photographs of the exhibits

options.title: A
options.content: is forbidden in the Digital Art room.

options.title: B
options.content: is not allowed in any part of the museum.

options.title: C
options.content: is only allowed in a new section of the museum.

items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C，因为原文中明确指出只有在Digital Art room（一个新的展览区）才允许拍照。导游说："please ensure that you do not take any pictures once you leave the Digital Art room"，这意味着在Digital Art room是允许拍照的，但一旦离开就不允许了。这要求考生进行逆向推理，从禁止在其他区域拍照的信息中推断出只有在特定区域允许拍照。
